title: Israeli troops seize new positions in Lebanon, army says creating buffer zone
author: FRANCE24
fullText:

04:16 
 
 
 
 
 Issued on: 03/03/2026 - 15:13
summary: Israel on Tuesday ordered the military to take control of more positions inside Lebanon to create a buffer zone, as the Lebanese army pulled back some of its forces after Hezbollah attacked Israeli bases in support of its backer, Iran. Lebanon was drawn into the regional war after an initial rocket attack on Israel by Hezbollah, which said it wanted to "avenge" the killing of Iranian supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei during the US-Israeli strikes. FRANCE 24's Noga Tarnopolsky reports from Je
